note: One complete High Card Duel round replays deterministically from a seeded setup.
migration_update_note: Initial High Card Duel Trace Schema v1 fixture established by GAT72GAT8HIG-012.

expected_private_view_hashes.not_applicable: This trace pins the observer/public replay surface; seat-private view is covered by seat-private-view.trace.json.

not_applicable.hidden_information: The observer/public view is hashed separately and must redact hands, deck, and face-down commitments.
not_applicable.stochastic_game_events: Setup randomness is fixed by the recorded seed.
not_applicable.private_view_hashes: Seat-private view is covered by a dedicated trace.
not_applicable.preview_hashes: High Card Duel uses legal action metadata and effects rather than a separate preview hash surface.
